• Mega Miner NG is a browser-based multiplayer mining game with procedurally generated worlds.
  • Features real-time multiplayer via MQTT, customizable controls, and cloud save functionality.
  • Includes an in-game shop system for upgrades, crafting, and trading with other players.
  • Supports mobile controls with on-screen D-pad and action buttons for touch devices.
  • Implements a sophisticated audio engine with dynamic sound effects and background music.
    class GameEngine { constructor() { this.canvas = $('gameCanvas'); this.ctx = this.canvas.getContext('2d'); } }
    class ShopSystem { constructor() { this.prices = { drill: [500, 2000, 10000], hull: 200, fuel: 200 }; } }

Mega Miner NG combines procedurally generated mining gameplay with real-time multiplayer functionality, featuring a sophisticated shop system, mobile controls, and cloud-based save management. The game uses MQTT for networking, Canvas for rendering, and IndexedDB for local storage, creating a complete web-based gaming experience.
